title: Summarize notable Rails main changes for the week of 2026-06-08
prompt: Using ONLY the changelog text provided below, write a one-page summary of the notable changes merged into rails/rails main during the week of 2026-06-08. Group by component (Active Record, Action Pack, etc.).
acceptance: Every change has a one-line summary and a source URL. up to 700 words. No claims beyond the provided text.

title: One-page digest of a provided open-access paper abstract + intro
prompt: Read the provided abstract and introduction of this open-access paper (pasted below) and produce a one-page plain-language digest: problem, method, headline result, and one limitation.
acceptance: up to 800 words. States the headline metric with its number. Names one concrete limitation. No claims beyond the provided text.

title: Plain-language summary of a provided city-council agenda excerpt
prompt: From the public meeting agenda text provided below, produce a plain-language summary: decisions to be made, who is affected, and any action items or follow-up dates. Explanatory summary only, not legal advice.
acceptance: Lists decisions, affected groups, and action items. up to 700 words. No claims beyond the provided text.

title: Summarize a provided public security advisory
prompt: From the advisory text provided below, summarize: affected versions, severity as stated by the source, mitigation steps, and any stated uncertainty. Treat as a summary of a public advisory, not independent security advice.
acceptance: Affected versions + severity + mitigations, each traceable to the provided text. up to 600 words.

title: Themes + summary of a provided public-domain essay (Project Gutenberg)
prompt: Given the full text of this public-domain essay (pasted below), write a short 'what it's about' summary plus three named themes with one supporting line each.
acceptance: up to 700 words. Three named themes, each with a supporting line. Public-domain source only.
